# cuijiawei.cn

> Personal blog of Jiawei Cui (崔家维 / kiritocui) — deep-dives on large language models and AI papers, software & frontend engineering, machine learning, and side projects. Content in Chinese and English.

## Index
- [Home](https://cuijiawei.cn/): Home page
- [Sitemap](https://cuijiawei.cn/sitemap.xml): Full URL index for crawlers
- [Atom feed](https://cuijiawei.cn/atom.xml): Latest posts feed

## Large Language Models & AI Papers (26)
- [The Transformer: Attention Is All You Need](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/03/01/the-transformer-attention-is-all-you-need/): Paper: Vaswani et al., Attention Is All You Need, NeurIPS 2017. [arXiv:1706.03762](https://arxiv.org/abs/1706.03762) You've almost certainly used a Transformer today. GPT, LLaMA, Claude, DeepSeek. All...
- [BERT: Bidirectional Pretraining from Transformers](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/03/08/bert-bidirectional-pretraining/): Pre-trained BERT with masked language modeling became the default backbone for NLP before decoder-only models took over.
- [GPT-3 and Few-Shot Learning at Scale](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/03/15/gpt-3-few-shot-learners/): GPT-3 showed that scaling to 175B parameters enables in-context few-shot learning with no gradient updates.
- [InstructGPT: Aligning LLMs with Human Preference (RLHF)](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/03/22/instructgpt-rlhf-alignment/): Paper: Ouyang et al., Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback (InstructGPT), 2022. [arXiv:2203.02155](https://arxiv.org/abs/2203.02155) GPT-3 could already do the task. Wha...
- [Chain-of-Thought Prompting: Let the Model Think Step by Step](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/03/29/chain-of-thought-prompting/): Chain-of-thought prompting improves reasoning by eliciting intermediate steps before the final answer.
- [LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Models](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/04/05/lora-low-rank-adaptation/): LoRA freezes the pretrained weights and learns a low-rank update, enabling cheap fine-tuning and swappable adapters.
- [FlashAttention: IO-Aware Exact Attention](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/04/12/flashattention-efficient-attention/): FlashAttention explained clearly: IO-aware exact attention that speeds up transformers. The tiling + online-softmax trick, intuition, and code. arXiv:2205.14135
- [LLaMA: The Open-Weight Catalyst](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/04/19/llama-open-weights-revolution/): LLaMA proved smaller models trained on more high-quality tokens can match much larger ones, igniting the open-weight era.
- [Mixtral of Experts: Sparse Mixture of Experts](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/04/26/mixtral-mixture-of-experts/): Mixtral is a sparse mixture-of-experts model that activates only a few experts per token, combining dense-model quality with cheaper inference.
- [DeepSeek-R1: Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/05/03/deepseek-r1-reasoning-rl/): DeepSeek-R1 explained: open-weight reasoning from pure RL, no supervised reasoning data. How it matches o1, and the recipe. arXiv:2501.12948
- [RAG: Retrieval-Augmented Generation](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/05/10/rag-retrieval-augmented-generation/): RAG explained: marry a generative model with an external knowledge index so it can look things up. The seed of every production LLM app. arXiv:2005.11401
- [ReAct: Reasoning + Acting in Language Models](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/05/17/react-reasoning-acting/): Paper: Yao, Zhao, Yu, Du, Shafran, Narasimhan, Cao, ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models, ICLR 2023. [arXiv:2210.03629](https://arxiv.org/abs/2210.03629) A raw LLM can reason (th...
- [Toolformer: Language Models That Teach Themselves to Use Tools](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/05/24/toolformer-tools/): Toolformer explained: a 6B model teaches itself to use tools from unlabeled text. The ancestor of GPT-4 function calling, with code. arXiv:2302.04761
- [Reflexion: Verbal Reinforcement Learning for Language Agents](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/05/31/reflexion-verbal-rl/): Reflexion explained: improve language agents with verbal RL, no weight updates, just memory of mistakes. The self-reflect loop, with code. arXiv:2303.11366
- [Generative Agents: Believable Simulacra of Human Behavior](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/06/07/generative-agents/): Paper: Park, Chan, Roh, Zito, Fried, Bernstein, Generative Agents: Interactive Simulacra of Human Behavior, UIST 2023. [arXiv:2304.03442](https://arxiv.org/abs/2304.03442) How do you give an LLM an on...
- [AutoGen: Multi-Agent Conversation as Computation](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/06/14/autogen-multi-agent/): AutoGen is a framework for building multi-agent conversations where LLM and tool-using agents collaborate to solve tasks.
- [Tree of Thoughts: Deliberate Problem Solving](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/06/21/tree-of-thoughts/): Tree of Thoughts explained: how LLMs explore, judge, and backtrack through a search tree instead of one greedy chain. Intuition + examples. arXiv:2305.10601
- [Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/06/28/scaling-laws/): Paper: Kaplan, J., et al., Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models, 2020. [arXiv:2001.08361](https://arxiv.org/abs/2001.08361) Before this paper, "how big should the model be?" got answered by vibes a...
- [RoPE: Rotary Position Embedding](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/07/03/rope/): Paper: Su, J., et al., RoFormer: Enhanced Transformer with Rotary Position Embedding, 2021. [arXiv:2104.09864](https://arxiv.org/abs/2104.09864) Position encoding is the quiet mechanism that tells a T...
- [Chinchilla: Training Compute-Optimal Large Language Models](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/06/30/chinchilla/): Chinchilla established the compute-optimal scaling law: model size and training tokens should scale together, favoring far more data than was common.
- [RLHF: Deep Reinforcement Learning from Human Preferences](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/07/05/rlhf-from-human-preferences/): RLHF aligns language models to human preferences by training a reward model on comparisons and optimizing the policy with PPO.
- [DPO: Direct Preference Optimization](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/07/07/dpo/): Paper: Rafailov, R., et al., Direct Preference Optimization: Your Language Model is Secretly a Reward Model, NeurIPS 2023. [arXiv:2305.18290](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.18290) RLHF works, but it's a c...
- [Constitutional AI: Harmlessness from AI Feedback](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/07/09/constitutional-ai/): Constitutional AI (RLAIF) explained: how Anthropic trained harmlessness from AI feedback instead of human raters. The recipe, with code. arXiv:2212.08073
- [Self-Consistency: Improving Chain-of-Thought Reasoning](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/07/10/self-consistency/): Self-Consistency explained: sample many reasoning paths, take the majority vote. The cheapest accuracy win for LLM reasoning. arXiv:2203.11171
- [CLIP: Learning Transferable Visual Models From Language Supervision](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/07/11/clip/): Paper: Radford, A., et al. (OpenAI), Learning Transferable Visual Models From Natural Language Supervision, ICML 2021. [arXiv:2103.00020](https://arxiv.org/abs/2103.00020) CLIP changed what "understan...
- [Softmax: Turning Logits into Probabilities](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/07/18/softmax/): Every time a language model predicts the next word, or an image classifier picks among a thousand labels, there is a softmax at the very end turning raw numbers into a probability distribution. It is...

## Software Engineering (6)
- [Advanced Javascript题目](https://cuijiawei.cn/2017/03/16/Learning Advanced Javascript/): 2: Goal: To be able to understand this function: {% highlight javascript linenos %} // The .bind method from Prototype.js Function.prototype.bind = function(){ var fn = this, args = Array.prototype.sl...
- [面向连接的运输：TCP](https://cuijiawei.cn/2017/05/18/面向连接的运输：TCP/): 面向连接的运输：TCP 3.5.1 TCP连接 ​ TCP连接是面向连接的，因为一个应用进程可以开始向另一个应用进程发送数据之前，这两个进程必须先相互“握手”。（相互发送某些预备报文段，以建立确保数据传输的参数） ​ 全双工服务 ： A和B之间如果存在一条TCP连接，则应用层数据从A流向B的同时，就有数据从B流向A ​ 点对点： 单个发送只能有一个接收方 ​ MSS：最大报文长度（Maximum...
- [经济学原理](https://cuijiawei.cn/2017/06/26/曼昆--经济学原理/): Chapter I 经济学十大原理 - 原理一：人们面临权衡取舍 - 效率是指社会能从其稀缺资源中得到最大的利益 - 平等是指将这些利益平均地分配给社会成员 - 原理二：某种东西的成本是为了得到它放弃的东西 - 机会成本是为了得到这种东西所放弃的东西。决策者应该认识到每一种可能的行动所带来的机会成本 - 原理三： 理性人考虑边际量 - 理性人系统有目的地尽最大努力去实现其目标 - 边际变动：描述现...
- [iptables初探](https://cuijiawei.cn/2017/11/25/iptables 初探/): iptables 基本命令 iptables 语法 我们来看看 iptables 命令的语法帮助信息，并将其保存到文本文件想要通过步骤检查，可以在终端输入： sudo iptables -h ~/iptableshelp 查看 iptables 表的规则 iptables 有表 (tables) 的概念，每张表又包含不同链 (chains)，大部分情况下我们仅需要使用 filter 和 nat 两...
- [linux邮件服务](https://cuijiawei.cn/2017/12/01/%E9%82%AE%E4%BB%B6%E6%9C%8D%E5%8A%A1/): 腾讯云开发者实验室系列 域名解析 域名购买完成后, 需要将域名解析到实验云主机上，实验云主机的 IP 为：123.207.70.98 在腾讯云购买的域名，可以到控制台添加解析记录： 完成该实验共需要添加两条记录： A 记录 记录类型：A 主机记录：@ 记录值：123.207.70.98 MX 记录 记录类型：MX 主机记录：@ 记录值：yourdomain.com（替换为自己域名） 生效检查 域名...
- [IE浏览器button标签不能嵌套a标签解决办法](https://cuijiawei.cn/2018/04/26/IE%E4%B8%8Bbutton%E6%A0%87%E7%AD%BE%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E5%B5%8C%E5%A5%97a%E6%A0%87%E7%AD%BE%E8%A7%A3%E5%86%B3%E5%8A%9E%E6%B3%95/): 问题是这样的，最近在帮一个留美同学做一个亲子教育网站，在沟通过程中了解到美国那边仍然有不少IE用户，所以那个同学希望可以适配IE浏览器。虽然酬劳不是很多，但是毕竟是同学，对于网站的每一个细节仍然要加以注意。 在IE中调试时发现，一个button标签下的a标签不起作用了，代码大概长下面这个样子。 这个时候点击a标签不能进行跳转，一开始我以为是IE将button渲染在a标签之上了，于是在a的样式表加上...

## Artificial Intelligence (4)
- [Deep Learning](https://cuijiawei.cn/2025/10/22/intro-to-deep-learning/): A practical intro to deep learning: from perceptrons to backprop, CNNs, RNNs, and Transformers.
- [Game AI and Reinforcement Learning](https://cuijiawei.cn/2025/12/20/intro-to-game-ai-and-reinforcement-learning/): How reinforcement learning powers game AI, from Q-learning and DQN to AlphaGo and AlphaZero.
- [Machine Learning Explainability](https://cuijiawei.cn/2025/12/28/machine-learning-explainability/): Model explainability techniques: feature importance, LIME, SHAP, and the trade-off between accuracy and interpretability.
- [Computer Vision](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/01/15/computer-vision/): Foundations of computer vision: from convolutional nets and ImageNet to transfer learning and vision transformers.

## Data & ML (3)
- [Kaggle与数据科学：实战技巧与最佳实践](https://cuijiawei.cn/2025/09/15/kaggle-data-science-practical-notes/): 在Kaggle竞赛和数据科学实践中，我总结了一些实用的技巧，涵盖数据清洗、可视化、时间序列处理等多个方面。这些经验来自于实际项目，希望能对大家有所帮助。 1. 数据清洗技巧 1.1 时间戳标准化 在处理时间序列数据时，时间戳格式混乱是常见问题。以下是一个标准化时间戳的通用方法： 1.2 处理非标准数值格式 数据中常常包含非标准格式的数值，如"15k"、"20000 yuan"等，需要统一处理： 1...
- [Geospatial Analysis](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/01/02/geospatial-analysis/): Geospatial data analysis: coordinate systems, spatial joins, and the Python stack for working with maps and geometries.
- [Advanced SQL](https://cuijiawei.cn/2026/01/10/advanced-sql/): Advanced SQL: window functions, CTEs, query optimization, and indexing for analytical workloads.
